case_title: JOSEFINA MENDOZA CARVAJAL VS. SOUP FREAKS INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARVAJAL, JOSEFINA MENDOZA AS TO DEFENDANT SOUP FREAKS INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARVAJAL, JOSEFINA MENDOZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUP FREAKS INCORPORATED, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $8,411.15 PRINCIPAL, $10.54 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,646.69, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
